description: Goal: artifact and backend work must consume engine-settled facts, not infer readiness from fact presence plus manual revision snapshots. Signal: MaterializeRoot waits on settled SemanticClosed(root); stale semantic dependencies block through the scheduler; semantic_closure_is_current and DependencySnapshot are deleted. Strategy: convert SealSemanticClosure and MaterializeRoot to the current/settled fact-use contract, move freshness authority into the engine, and remove wait_for_fresh_closure logic that manually polls dependency revisions.
title: Compiler2 artifacts: consume settled semantic facts and delete manual freshness checks
